phase10_readiness.reason: Phase 9 proves verified external files can be handed to native code on the target phone, so a deterministic layer-slice artifact and reference checker is the next safe scale-up.

useful_conclusions: Phase 9 JSON extracted and validated from Device Farm logcat.
The Android native shard-loader path reached JNI/C++ on the real phone and reported mmap_readonly native file loading.
The JSON reports SHA-256 verification before native load and java_tensor_bytes_passed=false, which is the intended Phase 9 architectural step.
The model remains a tiny external toy artifact; this is not Qwen 9B, not accelerator execution, and not a performance claim.
The next practical phase is a tiny layer-slice correctness ladder before any larger model or tokens/sec measurement.
